stemHtml: You are flying at FL80 over a hilly area with the highest obstacle at 5800 ft. The QNH at a nearby aerodrome (elevation 2000 ft) is 1003 hPa, and the temperature at the aerodrome is -11°C. Considering the Minimum Obstacle Clearance Altitude (MOCA), is your vertical separation from the obstacle sufficient?

options.a: Yes, because the obstacle clearance is more than 1000 ft.
options.b: Yes, because FL80 corresponds to approximately 8000 ft regardless of temperature.
options.c: No, because the pressure and temperature corrections reduce your altitude below the obstacle height.
options.d: No, because the corrected true altitude provides only about 1649 ft of clearance.
